body_txt: The Precision F-Strike relies on timing. The Cluster F-Bomb relies on frequency and multitude. The Atomic F-Bomb relies on VOLUME . Sometimes this trope is self-censoring and cuts to some other scene (like birds flying away ) to imply the volume. A Sub-Trope of Big Word Shout and Chewing the Scenery . Compare Big "NO!" , Big "WHAT?!" . No relation to Dirty Bomb .
